Qatar condemns Houthi attack on Saudi vessel
articles.summary: Qatar condemns Houthi attack on Saudi vessel The Qatari foreign ministry has released a statement denouncing the Houthi attack on a Saudi Arabian vessel in the Red Sea. "Qatar strongly condemns the Houthis' targeting of a Saudi vessel while it was sailing in the Red Sea, and it considers it a grave violation of international freedom of navigation," the ministry said in the statement. "The Ministry of Foreign Affairs reaffirms the State of Qatar's solidarity with the sisterly Kingdom of Saudi Arabia," the statement added.

articles.title: Israeli army kills Palestinian near Jenin, occupied West Bank
articles.summary: Israeli army kills Palestinian near Jenin, occupied West Bank A Palestinian was killed by the Israeli army following an alleged stabbing attempt on an Israeli soldier in the occupied West Bank. articles.summary: Israeli army shoots two Palestinians in occupied West Bank Two Palestinians were shot by Israeli troops after an Israeli settler was stabbed in the occupied West Bank. The settler was severely wounded, according to Israeli media reports.
